ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Driver's phone number */,
  "pin" TEXT /* PIN associated with the driver's account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the driver's account (e.g., active, locked) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the driver registered the account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the driver */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last successful login */,
  "failed_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts in the last 24 hours */,
  "lock_expiration" TEXT /* Date and time when the account will be unlocked if locked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kiosks" (
  "kiosk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kiosk */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the kiosk is located */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of kiosk registration (e.g., registered, unregistered) */,
  "configuration_status" TEXT /* Status of kiosk configuration (e.g., configured, unconfigured) */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance performed on the kiosk */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the kiosk */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for each kiosk */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Current software version installed on the kiosk */,
  "next_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kiosk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for issues related to the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site location */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the site manager */,
  "manager_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the site manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_messages" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error message */,
  "server_code" TEXT /* Code associated with the error from the server */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error message */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Recommended resolution for the error */,
  "context" TEXT /* Contextual information regarding where the error occurs */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the error (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "last_occurred" TEXT /* Date and time of the last occurrence of the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login attempt */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver attempting to log in */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the login attempt */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates if the login attempt was successful */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the login was attempted */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the login was attempted (e.g., IP geolocation) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the login attempt (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who initiated the transaction */,
  "kiosk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the kiosk where the transaction occurred */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of fuel dispensed in gallons */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., credit card, debit card, cash) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel dispensed (e.g., regular, premium, diesel) */,
  "price_per_gallon" REAL /* Price per gallon of the fuel dispensed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "kiosk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the kiosk to which the setting applies */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., SMS support) */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who last updated the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the admin user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin user (e.g., support, manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the admin user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last successful login */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts in the last 24 hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_logs" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., SMS, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_logs" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location log */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver whose location is logged */,
  "kiosk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the kiosk being approached */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the location log */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the kiosk in meters */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the driver's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the driver's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_logs" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication log */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver involved in the communication */,
  "message_type" TEXT /* Type of message (e.g., error, notification) */,
  "message_content" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the communication */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the communication (e.g., driver, system) */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the communication (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver to whom the alert is sent */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., warning, info) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., unread, read) */,
  "read_timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software package */,
  "kiosk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the kiosk where the package is installed */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software package */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the software package */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the software package (e.g., active, outdated) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the software package was installed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the software package was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)
